mapper.sql: id, name, code, description, IFNULL(is_system, 0) AS is_system, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM roles ORDER BY is_system DESC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO roles (name, code, description, is_system) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{description}, IFNULL(#{isSystem}, 0))
mapper.update: UPDATE roles SET name = #{name}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM roles WHERE id = #{id} AND IFNULL(is_system, 0) = #{isSystem}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.code, p.module, p.description, p.created_at FROM permissions p INNER JOIN role_permissions rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY p.module, p.id
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO role_permissions (role_id, permission_id) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{permissionId})
